title: Congress to vote on foreign aid bill that threatens TikTok's future
shortDescription: Inside a bill that would provide foreign aid to American allies is language that would force ByteDance to sell TikTok or be banned in the U.S.

title: Trump and RNC announce 100,000 poll-watcher program, experts skeptical
shortDescription: Republicans and their affiliates have for years touted efforts to mobilize volunteers to catch election fraud, but never find it.

title: Former President Trump on 2024 campaign trail
shortDescription: A criminal trial won't keep former President Donald Trump off the campaign trail, as he vies for a second presidential term in the 2024 election.

title: Trump falsely claims 2018 Stormy Daniels letter 'just found' | Fact check
shortDescription: The letter is not new, it was released in 2018 and widely publicized. Daniels later said the denial was a lie from fear of legal repercussions.

title: Wyoming governor, secretary of state clash over voter registration
shortDescription: A disagreement over voter registration laws highlights growing rifts between Wyoming's Governor and Secretary of State

title: Courtroom sketch artists are our gateway into Donald Trump’s New York trial
shortDescription: With cameras banned in New York courtrooms, sketch artists are providing America with a glimpse into the first ever criminal trial of a former US president.

title: Man sets himself on fire outside Trump trial at New York courthouse
shortDescription: Officials say Maxwell Azzarello spread conspiracy theory pamphlets before setting himself on fire outside of the courthouse where Donald Trump sits.

title: No, Communist Party USA didn't endorse Joe Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: Leaders of the group say they do not endorse candidates from other parties. It did not endorse Biden in 2020 and has not backed him in 2024.

title: A Republican hasn't won Minnesota in 50 years, could Trump do it?
shortDescription: The North Star State hasn't voted for a Republican president in over five decades. Could 2024 be the year it goes red?

title: President Biden gets Kennedy family endorsement
shortDescription: Kerry Kennedy, daughter of Robert Kennedy, announced that the Kennedy family is endorsing Joe Biden for president.

title: Biden could have a tough fight in Minnesota this year
shortDescription: Minnesota hasn't elected a Republican for president in decades, but low party support and close margins means the state could be in play for Trump.

title: Trump day 4 trial updates: Man sets himself on fire outside courthouse
shortDescription: Follow along with updates from Donald Trump's hush money trial as court resumes after a man set himself on fire on the street outside.

title: Presidential task: How one man looks to steer frustrated voters to Biden
shortDescription: Democrat Ro Khanna is touring swing states, talking to young voters about Gaza. Why he thinks President Joe Biden has a 2024 problem.

title: After long wait, Biden poised to nix Trump-era Title IX rules
shortDescription: The Biden administration has finalized a long-awaited overhaul of Title IX, the federal law that protects students from sex-based discrimination.

title: Rep. Khanna on the move for Biden campaign
shortDescription: Rep. Ro Khanna has become one of the most influential progressives on Capitol Hill. The Biden reelection campaign is taking notice.

title: What we know about the 12 jurors on Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan said 12 jurors have been selected in Donald Trump's hush money trial. Juror #4 and Juror #2 were previously dismissed.

title: GOP lawmaker blames Marjorie Taylor Greene for holding Congress 'hostage'
shortDescription: Rep. Marc Molinaro called out his fellow Republican lawmaker, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, after she urged the ouster of House Speaker Mike Johnson.

title: Exclusive: dismissed Trump trial juror #4 calls judge 'cowardly'
shortDescription: Herson Cabreras said he was taken aback when prosecutors moved to oust him from the jury in Donald Trump's criminal trial.
